title: Vulture (EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate)
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
{{Otheruses|Vulture}}
'''''Vulture''''' was an [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] that served in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

The [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] learned of the existence of an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] repair facility (actually a converted [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighter]]) near [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] through the [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]], [[Tuz]], and realized that its destruction would cripple the infrastructure that serviced the [[Starship/Legends|starships]] the Death Star's construction relied on. A pair of [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]] from [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red Squadron]] was tasked with destroying the facility.

When the Imperials discovered the [[Attack on the Imperial repair dock|attack]], the ''Vulture'' was dispatched to save the facility. However, by the time they arrived the [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] [[Falcon (CR90 corvette)|''Falcon'']] had already been destroyed and the repair facility itself fell soon after, at which point one of the Y-wings left the area. Though the ''Vulture'' launched [[TIE series/Legends|TIE starfighters]] against the remaining Y-wing, flown by [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]], the Rebel pilot was able to destroy the remaining [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport|transports]] in the area before jumping to [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]].
